/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libgalay-etcd.dylib -install_name @rpath/libgalay-etcd.dylib "CMakeFiles/galay-etcd.dir/async/AsyncEtcdClient.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-etcd.dir/base/EtcdError.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/galay-etcd.dir/sync/EtcdClient.cc.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libgalay-kernel.a /usr/local/lib/libgalay-http.1.0.0.dylib /usr/local/lib/libspdlog.a -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libgalay-kernel.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/simdjson/3.12.3/lib/libsimdjson.dylib
